name: Verbose Post-Install Troubleshooting With Missing Details
description: A first-time owner gives a long, unfocused description of problems that started after a recent installation but omits key diagnostic details. The agent should steer the conversation, extract the relevant symptoms and timing, and provide appropriate installation-issue guidance.
initialMessage: Hi, sorry this is a lot, but ever since the unit was put in yesterday my car has felt kind of weird, and I'm not really sure what matters, but I noticed a light for a little while and then it went away, and now I'm nervous to drive it to work tomorrow. Can you help me figure out what you need from me?
expectedOutcome: The agent clarifies the recent-install context, gathers the missing symptom details and timing, and gives a coherent next-step recommendation tailored to an installation-related issue.
expectedMilestones: Key symptoms and warning-light behavior clarified
Actionable troubleshooting or follow-up guidance provided
